headline: Grove Finance: core contracts and infrastructure identified; specific deployed contract addresses not yet catalogued
short_headline: Infrastructure identified; addresses to be discovered

findings.text: Block explorer name-tag search pending for Ethereum, Base, Avalanche, Plume Mainnet. Initial searches did not surface Grove Finance protocol contracts with clear naming conventions; search results returned unrelated Grove tokens/projects.
Official deployments documentation not found. Grove docs list contract names (ALMProxy, MainnetController, ForeignController, RateLimits) but do not include deployed contract addresses per chain.
No audit PDFs provided in protocol.audit_links. GitHub repos include /audits folder but URLs cannot be fetched due to access restrictions.

GitHub repository identified: https://github.com/grove-labs. Key repos: grove-alm-controller (Solidity, forked from sparkdotfi/spark-alm-controller), grove-address-registry, grove-spells. Deployment artifacts or address lists not yet extracted from these repositories.
Multi-chain scope confirmed: Ethereum, Base, Plume Mainnet, Avalanche. Per-chain address enumeration not yet completed.
No factory contracts with child enumeration identified at this stage.
Contract roles inferred from documentation: ALMProxy (custody), MainnetController (logic), ForeignController (logic on spoke chains), RateLimits (risk management). Actor classes not yet determined.
No addresses yet added to admin_addresses[]; discovery incomplete.

rationale.verdict: Address discovery for Grove Finance is in early stages. Core infrastructure (ALMProxy, controllers, RateLimits) identified from documentation and GitHub. Off-chain sources (docs, GitHub) fetched; on-chain contract enumeration via block explorers and read API not yet completed due to lack of starting addresses in address_book. Recommend next run: direct block explorer search for 'Grove' protocol tags on each chain; fetch deployed addresses from grove-address-registry repository; execute live contract reads via DeFiPunkd API once addresses are pinned.

evidence.shows: Grove Finance public dashboard; confirms protocol operates on multiple chains with live TVL and deployment data.
Grove documentation homepage listing core components: Grove Allocator, GROVE Token, Security, Changelog. Links to architecture docs but no deployed address list.
Detailed specification of Grove Allocator architecture: ALMProxy (custody), MainnetController, ForeignController, RateLimits. No deployed contract addresses provided.

Grove Labs GitHub organization with 7 public repositories. Primary repo is grove-alm-controller (Solidity, AGPL-3.0, forked from Spark). Also grove-spells, grove-address-registry, dss-allocator, grove-gov-relay, xchain-helpers, endgame-toolkit.

Main Grove Liquidity Layer contract repository. Contains ALMProxy, MainnetController, RateLimits contracts. Deployment folder exists but not yet fetched. Updated Feb 3, 2026. 4 releases (latest v1.8.0 Dec 23, 2025).
GROVE token (GVR) contract on Ethereum. ERC-20 token with governance/utility function. This is a peripheral asset, not a core protocol contract.

unknowns: D1: Etherscan, Basescan, Avax, and Plume block explorer name-tag searches for 'Grove' or 'Grove Finance' did not yield verified protocol contract addresses in initial attempt. Requires targeted search or manual enumeration.
D2: grove-address-registry repository could not be fetched (access denied). This repo likely contains canonical deployed addresses per chain but content not retrieved.

D4: grove-alm-controller/deploy folder exists but Foundry broadcast artifacts, hardhat-deploy configs, or manual deployment indexes not yet extracted. Commit SHAs and deployment scripts require direct repo content fetch.
D5: Zero addresses currently known for Plume Mainnet deployment; Ethereum, Base, Avalanche addresses not yet discovered.
D8-offchain: No on-chain contract reads attempted yet (address_book empty). Block explorer URLs for ALMProxy, MainnetController per chain required before /api/contract/read calls can be made.

protocol_metadata.about: Grove Finance is an institutional-grade onchain capital allocator that deploys stablecoin liquidity (particularly USDS) into diversified credit strategies across multiple chains. The protocol operates as a vault-based, non-custodial system with core contracts (ALMProxy, MainnetController, ForeignController, RateLimits) managing cross-chain capital routing and rate limiting. Developed by Grove Labs, a subsidiary of Steakhouse Financial, as part of the Sky ecosystem.
